description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs `bundle install` as a global before_script. Define a variable `JEKYLL_ENV` set to `production` and two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, saves the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except `master`. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the `master` branch. Both jobs inherit the before_script and use the same Ruby environment.
